content: ACCT_ACTIVITY MESSAGE_TYPE values for Schwab streaming are GENUINELY UNDOCUMENTED. schwab-py docs confirm the field exists (AccountActivityFields.MESSAGE_TYPE = 2, MESSAGE_DATA = 3) but lists no constants. Schwab Streamer Guide and all community sources confirm no official enumeration. TDA-era (pre-Schwab migration) empirical types included SUBSCRIBED, OrderEntryRequest, OrderFill, UROut, but these may differ on Schwab API. Confirmed approach: log all events empirically via stream handler, forward raw ACCT_ACTIVITY events to server with permissive Zod parse, never filter based on assumed type values. Dynamic subscription (D-03) should use position reconcile diff rather than message-type parsing.
